plans.name: General PurposeBalance between price and performance
Included MRUsA user is counted as retained when they return 24+ hours after signing up.
SMS codesAuthenticate with a code sent directly to the user's phone via SMS. US and Canada, $0.01 per SMS + International: market rate
Satellite domainsUse the same session across applications hosted on different domains.
Monthly retained organizations (MROs)An organization is retained when it has at least 2 members and at least one of those members is a retained user.
